# First Touch - LLM Discovery File

> Primary entity: First Touch (EMA AI context)
> Domain intent: Enterprise AI agent orchestration, workflow automation governance, and integration-first operations

## Summary
First Touch is an enterprise execution layer that orchestrates incoming operational demand across existing tools.
It is designed for regulated or high-accountability environments where explainability, human checkpoints, and auditability are required.

## Core Value
- reduce manual routing overhead
- accelerate intake-to-resolution cycle time
- preserve governance via policy thresholds and action trace
- scale workflows without vendor lock-in

## Core Use Cases
- executive support triage
- revops lead-to-meeting orchestration
- customer escalation routing
- finance approval and invoice operations
- compliance/document workflows
- vendor onboarding flows

## Architecture Signals
- API-first integration layer
- model-agnostic orchestration
- semantic retrieval for factual grounding
- episodic memory for action consistency
- human-in-the-loop threshold controls

## Offer Model
- constrained 8-week throughput pilot
- baseline vs pilot KPI measurement
- bonus stack (integration blueprint, governance matrix, KPI scoreboard, scale plan)
- risk-reversal handover clause
- capped onboarding per quarter

## Lead Magnet
JANA Offer Pack = Justified Autonomy, No App-Lock

Includes:
- 40-point workflow bottleneck scorecard
- integration map template
- value equation worksheet
- governance threshold starter matrix
- strategy call prep checklist
